The gap no one talks about
Your capabilities
are real.
Your story isn't ready.
Defense tech companies win SBIR awards, complete pilots, and build real capabilities then lose deals because decision-makers can't understand or justify what they do.

The problem isn't your technology. It's your narrative.

01
SBIR Stage
Phase II & III Companies
Transitioning from R&D awards toward programs of record and sustained revenue. You've proven the concept. Now you need the story to match.

Growth Stage
DoD & IC Contractors

Dual-Use
Commercial-to-Defense

05
The valley of death is a narrative problem
Most defense startups
don't fail on technology.
They fail on credibility.

"Will your website pass the sniff test for a contracting shop?"

"Do you have anything that looks like past performance?"

"Can you explain what you do in terms a program office can actually buy?"

These are the questions Cassian helps you answer before they're asked.
